Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Bardic Inspiration: R60' Can use a bonus action 2 times per long rest to give an ally +1d6 on an ability check, attack, or save within 1 hr
Divine Spark: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to restore 1d8 hit points or to inflict 1d8 HP of a choice of necrotic or radiant (save Constitution half)
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Turn Undead: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to make undead flee (save DC 12 Wisdom negates) for 1 min or until damaged
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 4 chosen kinds of Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution; Dexterity; Intelligence; Strength; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +4; Constitution: +4; Dexterity: +6; Intelligence: +4; Strength: +4; Wisdom: +4

Bestow Curse (B3 Necr): Touched suffers a choice of disadvantage on specified ability rolls, disadvantage on attacks on self, requiring a successful Wisdom save to take any action other than Dodge, or +1d8 HP necrotic from self attacks (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the maximum duration to 10 min, 8 hr, 24 hr, or permanent at level 4, 5, 7, or 9; levels above 4 require no concentration]
Bestow Curse (C3 Necr): Touched suffers a choice of disadvantage on specified ability rolls, disadvantage on attacks on self, requiring a successful Wisdom save to take any action other than Dodge, or +1d8 HP necrotic from self attacks (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the maximum duration to 10 min, 8 hr, 24 hr, or permanent at level 4, 5, 7, or 9; levels above 4 require no concentration]

Confusion (B4 Ench): R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the radius by 5']
Confusion (D4 Ench): R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the radius by 5']
Confusion (S4 Ench): R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the radius by 5']
Confusion (W4 Ench): R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the radius by 5']
Conjure Animals (D3 Conj): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d10 HP slashing (save Dexterity negates), and 5' radius gives self advantage on Strength saves, for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Conjure Animals (R3 Conj): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d10 HP slashing (save Dexterity negates), and 5' radius gives self advantage on Strength saves, for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Conjure Celestial (C7 Conj): R90' 10' radius either restores 4d12+2 hit points or inflicts 6d12 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) on each target for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn [+Level restores or inflicts +1d12 hit points]
Conjure Elemental (D5 Conj): R60' 5' radius restrains a target and inflicts 8d8 HP of a choice of lightning, thunder, fire, or cold (save Dexterity negates), inflicting an additional 4d8 HP each rd until a successful Dexterity save, for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Conjure Elemental (W5 Conj): R60' 5' radius restrains a target and inflicts 8d8 HP of a choice of lightning, thunder, fire, or cold (save Dexterity negates), inflicting an additional 4d8 HP each rd until a successful Dexterity save, for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Conjure Fey (D6 Conj): R60' Melee spell attacks by a summoned spirit inflict 3d12+2 HP psychic and frightened until the start of the next turn for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn as a bonus action [+Level inflicts +1d12 HP]
Conjure Minor Elementals (D4 Conj): Self attacks within 15' inflict +2d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, or lightning for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Conjure Minor Elementals (W4 Conj): Self attacks within 15' inflict +2d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, or lightning for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Conjure Woodland Beings (D4 Conj): 10' emanation inflicts 5d8 HP force (save Wisdom half) and allows self to use a bonus action to Disengage for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Conjure Woodland Beings (R4 Conj): 10' emanation inflicts 5d8 HP force (save Wisdom half) and allows self to use a bonus action to Disengage for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Contact Other Plane (K5 Divi): Contact with an extraplanar being inflicts 6d6 HP psychic and incapacitated on self until a long rest (save DC 15 Intelligence negates and gives one-word answers to 5 questions) [R]
Contact Other Plane (W5 Divi): Contact with an extraplanar being inflicts 6d6 HP psychic and incapacitated on self until a long rest (save DC 15 Intelligence negates and gives one-word answers to 5 questions) [R]
Contagion (C5 Necr): Touch inflicts 11d8 HP necrotic, poisoned, and disadvantage on chosen ability saves (save Constitution negates; subsequent saves each turn either end after three successes or extend to 7 days after 3 failures; other effects that would end poisoned require a successful Constitution save to succeed)
Contagion (D5 Necr): Touch inflicts 11d8 HP necrotic, poisoned, and disadvantage on chosen ability saves (save Constitution negates; subsequent saves each turn either end after three successes or extend to 7 days after 3 failures; other effects that would end poisoned require a successful Constitution save to succeed)
Contingency (W6 Abju): Sets a trigger for a spell of level 5 or lower to affect self within 10 days
Continual Flame (C2 Evoc): Touched emits a heatless torch flame
Continual Flame (D2 Evoc): Touched emits a heatless torch flame
Continual Flame (W2 Evoc): Touched emits a heatless torch flame
Control Water (C4 Tran): R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Control Water (D4 Tran): R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Control Water (W4 Tran): R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Control Weather (C8 Tran): Adjusts the temperature, wind, and precipitation in a 5 mile radius for concentration up to 8 hr
Control Weather (D8 Tran): Adjusts the temperature, wind, and precipitation in a 5 mile radius for concentration up to 8 hr
Control Weather (W8 Tran): Adjusts the temperature, wind, and precipitation in a 5 mile radius for concentration up to 8 hr
Counterspell (K3 Abju): R60' Negates foe casting (save Constitution negates)
Counterspell (S3 Abju): R60' Negates foe casting (save Constitution negates)
Counterspell (W3 Abju): R60' Negates foe casting (save Constitution negates)
Create Food And Water (C3 Conj): R30' Creates 45 lb of food that lasts for 24 hr and 30 gallons of water
Create Food And Water (P3 Conj): R30' Creates 45 lb of food that lasts for 24 hr and 30 gallons of water
Create Or Destroy Water (C1 Tran): R30' Creates or destroys 10 gallons of water or fog in a 30' cube [+Level affects +10 gallons or a +5' cube]
Create Or Destroy Water (D1 Tran): R30' Creates or destroys 10 gallons of water or fog in a 30' cube [+Level affects +10 gallons or a +5' cube]
Create Undead (C6 Necr): R10' 3 corpses become ghouls that obey commands within 120' for 24 hr; additional castings extend the duration for 24 hr [+Level creates 4 ghouls; 5 ghouls, 2 ghasts, or 2 wights; or 6 ghouls, 3 ghasts, 3 wights, or 2 mummies at level 7, 8, or 9]
Create Undead (K6 Necr): R10' 3 corpses become ghouls that obey commands within 120' for 24 hr; additional castings extend the duration for 24 hr [+Level creates 4 ghouls; 5 ghouls, 2 ghasts, or 2 wights; or 6 ghouls, 3 ghasts, 3 wights, or 2 mummies at level 7, 8, or 9]
Create Undead (W6 Necr): R10' 3 corpses become ghouls that obey commands within 120' for 24 hr; additional castings extend the duration for 24 hr [+Level creates 4 ghouls; 5 ghouls, 2 ghasts, or 2 wights; or 6 ghouls, 3 ghasts, 3 wights, or 2 mummies at level 7, 8, or 9]
Creation (S5 Illu): R30' Creates a 5' cube of false matter lasting 24 hr (vegetable matter), 12 hr (stone or crystal), 1 hr (precious metals), 10 min (gems), or 1 min (adamantine or mithral) [+Level creates a +5' cube]
Creation (W5 Illu): R30' Creates a 5' cube of false matter lasting 24 hr (vegetable matter), 12 hr (stone or crystal), 1 hr (precious metals), 10 min (gems), or 1 min (adamantine or mithral) [+Level creates a +5' cube]
Cure Wounds (B1 Abju): Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 hit points]
Cure Wounds (C1 Abju): Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 hit points]
Cure Wounds (D1 Abju): Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 hit points]
Cure Wounds (P1 Abju): Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 hit points]
Cure Wounds (R1 Abju): Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 hit points]
Dancing Lights (B0 Evoc): R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per rd as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Dancing Lights (S0 Evoc): R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per rd as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Dancing Lights (W0 Evoc): R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per rd as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Darkness (K2 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Darkness (S2 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Darkness (W2 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Darkvision (D2 Tran): Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Darkvision (R2 Tran): Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Darkvision (S2 Tran): Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Darkvision (W2 Tran): Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Daylight (C3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Daylight (D3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Daylight (P3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Daylight (R3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Daylight (S3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Death Ward (C4 Abju): Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Death Ward (P4 Abju): Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Delayed Blast Fireball (S7 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 12d6 HP fire + 1d6 HP fire per rd delayed (save Dexterity half) within concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Delayed Blast Fireball (W7 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 12d6 HP fire + 1d6 HP fire per rd delayed (save Dexterity half) within concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Demiplane (K8 Conj): R60' Creates a door that leads to a 30'x30'x30' extradimensional room for 1 hr
Demiplane (S8 Conj): R60' Creates a door that leads to a 30'x30'x30' extradimensional room for 1 hr
Demiplane (W8 Conj): R60' Creates a door that leads to a 30'x30'x30' extradimensional room for 1 hr
Detect Evil And Good (C1 Divi): R30' Reveals aberrations, celestials, elementals, feys, fiends, undead, and Hallow effects for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Detect Evil And Good (P1 Divi): R30' Reveals aberrations, celestials, elementals, feys, fiends, undead, and Hallow effects for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Detect Magic (B1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (C1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (D1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (K1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (P1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (R1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (S1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (W1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (C1 Divi): R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (D1 Divi): R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (P1 Divi): R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (R1 Divi): R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Thoughts (B2 Divi): R30' Reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom ends; additional Arcana checks each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 1' of stone, dirt, or wood, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Detect Thoughts (S2 Divi): R30' Reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom ends; additional Arcana checks each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 1' of stone, dirt, or wood, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Detect Thoughts (W2 Divi): R30' Reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom ends; additional Arcana checks each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 1' of stone, dirt, or wood, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Dimension Door (B4 Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Dimension Door (K4 Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Dimension Door (S4 Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Dimension Door (W4 Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Disguise Self (B1 Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Disguise Self (S1 Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Disguise Self (W1 Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Disintegrate (S6 Tran): R60' Inflicts 10d6+40 HP force and turns the target to dust if reduced to 0 HP (save Dexterity negates), or disintegrates a Large or smaller object or magical force [+Level inflicts +3d6 HP]
Disintegrate (W6 Tran): R60' Inflicts 10d6+40 HP force and turns the target to dust if reduced to 0 HP (save Dexterity negates), or disintegrates a Large or smaller object or magical force [+Level inflicts +3d6 HP]
Dispel Evil And Good (C5 Abju): Celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead suffer disadvantage on attacks vs. self for concentration up to 1 min; ending the spell early allows a successful spell attack on one of these creatures to return it to its home plane (save Charisma negates), or to end with a touch an enchanted, frightened, or possessed condition inflicted by one of them
Dispel Evil And Good (P5 Abju): Celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead suffer disadvantage on attacks vs. self for concentration up to 1 min; ending the spell early allows a successful spell attack on one of these creatures to return it to its home plane (save Charisma negates), or to end with a touch an enchanted, frightened, or possessed condition inflicted by one of them
Dispel Magic (B3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dispel Magic (C3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dispel Magic (D3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dispel Magic (K3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dispel Magic (P3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dispel Magic (R3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dispel Magic (S3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dispel Magic (W3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dissonant Whispers (B1 Ench): R60' Inflicts 3d6 HP psychic and forces the target to use its reaction to flee (save Wisdom half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Divination (C4 Divi): Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Divination (D4 Divi): Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Divination (W4 Divi): Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Divine Favor (P1 Tran): Self weapons inflict +1d4 HP radiant for 1 min
Divine Smite (P1 Evoc): Cast as a bonus action after hitting a target, causes the attack inflict +2d8 HP radiant, or +3d8 HP radiant on a fiend or undead [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Divine Smite (P1 [Paladin's Smite] Evoc): Cast as a bonus action after hitting a target, causes the attack inflict +2d8 HP radiant, or +3d8 HP radiant on a fiend or undead [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Divine Word (C7 Evoc): R30' Inflicts death on targets with up to 20 HP, blinded, deafened, and stunned for 1 hr on those with up to 30 HP, blinded and deafened for 10 min on those with up to 40 HP, and deafened for 1 min on those with up to 50 HP, and forces celestials, elementals, fey, and fiends to return to their home planes (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr
Dominate Beast (D4 Ench): R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7]
Dominate Beast (R4 Ench): R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7]
Dominate Beast (S4 Ench): R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7]
Dominate Monster (B8 Ench): R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 8 hr]
Dominate Monster (K8 Ench): R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 8 hr]
Dominate Monster (S8 Ench): R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 8 hr]
Dominate Monster (W8 Ench): R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 8 hr]
Dominate Person (B5 Ench): R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8]
Dominate Person (S5 Ench): R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8]
Dominate Person (W5 Ench): R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8]
Dragon's Breath (S2 Tran): Touched can use a Magic action to inflict 3d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison (save Dexterity half) in a 15' cone for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Dragon's Breath (W2 Tran): Touched can use a Magic action to inflict 3d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison (save Dexterity half) in a 15' cone for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Dream (B5 Illu): Touched controls the dreams of a known target for 8 hr and can inflict 3d6 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates)
Dream (K5 Illu): Touched controls the dreams of a known target for 8 hr and can inflict 3d6 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates)
Dream (W5 Illu): Touched controls the dreams of a known target for 8 hr and can inflict 3d6 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates)
Druidcraft (D0 Tran): R30' Predicts 24 hr weather, causes a plant to bloom, creates a minor sensory effect, or lights or snuffs a small fire
Earthquake (C8 Tran): R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Earthquake (D8 Tran): R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Earthquake (S8 Tran): R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Eldritch Blast (K0 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell creates 3 rays that inflict 1d10 HP force each
Elementalism (D0 Tran): R30' Moves air or dust in a 5' cube, creates smoke or mist in a 5' cube for 1 min, or sculpts a 1' cube of dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water for 1 hr
Elementalism (S0 Tran): R30' Moves air or dust in a 5' cube, creates smoke or mist in a 5' cube for 1 min, or sculpts a 1' cube of dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water for 1 hr
Elementalism (W0 Tran): R30' Moves air or dust in a 5' cube, creates smoke or mist in a 5' cube for 1 min, or sculpts a 1' cube of dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water for 1 hr
Enhance Ability (B2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Enhance Ability (C2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Enhance Ability (D2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Enhance Ability (R2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Enhance Ability (S2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Enhance Ability (W2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Enlarge/Reduce (B2 Tran): R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Enlarge/Reduce (D2 Tran): R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Enlarge/Reduce (S2 Tran): R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Enlarge/Reduce (W2 Tran): R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Ensnaring Strike (R1 Conj): Next successful self attack restrains the foe and inflicts 1d6 HP per rd piercing (save Strength ends; Large creatures have advantage on the save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Entangle (D1 Conj): R90' 20' sq inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Strength negates; additional Athletics saves each rd ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Entangle (R1 Conj): R90' 20' sq inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Strength negates; additional Athletics saves each rd ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Enthrall (B2 Ench): R60' Target suffers -10 Perception (save Wisdom negates; targets in battle automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 min
Enthrall (K2 Ench): R60' Target suffers -10 Perception (save Wisdom negates; targets in battle automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 min
Etherealness (B7 Conj): Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr [+Level affects +2 or +5 targets at level 8 or 9]
Etherealness (C7 Conj): Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr [+Level affects +2 or +5 targets at level 8 or 9]
Etherealness (K7 Conj): Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr [+Level affects +2 or +5 targets at level 8 or 9]
Etherealness (S7 Conj): Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr [+Level affects +2 or +5 targets at level 8 or 9]
Etherealness (W7 Conj): Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr [+Level affects +2 or +5 targets at level 8 or 9]
Expeditious Retreat (K1 Tran): Allows self to Dash immediately and then to use a bonus action to Dash each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Expeditious Retreat (S1 Tran): Allows self to Dash immediately and then to use a bonus action to Dash each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Expeditious Retreat (W1 Tran): Allows self to Dash immediately and then to use a bonus action to Dash each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Eyebite (B6 Necr): R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Eyebite (K6 Necr): R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Eyebite (S6 Necr): R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Eyebite (W6 Necr): R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Fabricate (W4 Tran): R120' Reshapes raw material into a 10' cube product, or a 5' cube product of stone or metal
Faerie Fire (B1 Evoc): R60' Objects and creatures in a 20' cube glow (save Dexterity negates), giving their foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min
Faerie Fire (D1 Evoc): R60' Objects and creatures in a 20' cube glow (save Dexterity negates), giving their foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min
Faithful Hound (W4 Conj): 1
False Life (S1 Necr): Self gains 2d4+4 temporary hit points [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
False Life (W1 Necr): Self gains 2d4+4 temporary hit points [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Fear (B3 Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Fear (K3 Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Fear (S3 Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Fear (W3 Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Feather Fall (B1 Tran): R60' 5 falling targets slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Feather Fall (S1 Tran): R60' 5 falling targets slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Feather Fall (W1 Tran): R60' 5 falling targets slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Find Familiar (D1 [Wild Companion] Conj): R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in animal form that allows telepathic communication, remote sensing, and use of its reaction to deliver remote touch attacks when within 100' [R]
Find Familiar (W1 Conj): R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in animal form that allows telepathic communication, remote sensing, and use of its reaction to deliver remote touch attacks when within 100' [R]
Find Steed (P2 Conj): R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in steed form; it has an Intelligence of at least 6, Armor Class 12, 25 hit points, and 60' Speed, regains an equal number of hit points from magical healing applied to self when within 5', makes a +2 attack that inflicts 1d8+2 HP of radiant, psychic, or necrotic, depending on spirit type, can use a bonus action to frighten within 60', teleport 60', or heal 2d8+2 hit points within 5', depending on spirit type, and can communicate telepathically with self for 1 mile [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, damage by 1, and healing by 1; level 4 also gives a 60' fly Speed]
Find The Path (B6 Divi): Reveals the shortest path to a specified familiar destination for concentration up to 1 day
Find The Path (C6 Divi): Reveals the shortest path to a specified familiar destination for concentration up to 1 day
Find The Path (D6 Divi): Reveals the shortest path to a specified familiar destination for concentration up to 1 day
Find Traps (C2 Divi): R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Find Traps (D2 Divi): R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Find Traps (R2 Divi): R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Finger Of Death (K7 Necr): R60' Target suffers 7d8+30 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) and becomes an obedient zombie if killed
Finger Of Death (S7 Necr): R60' Target suffers 7d8+30 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) and becomes an obedient zombie if killed
Finger Of Death (W7 Necr): R60' Target suffers 7d8+30 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) and becomes an obedient zombie if killed
Fire Bolt (S0 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 3d10 HP fire or ignites an unattended flammable target
Fire Bolt (W0 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 3d10 HP fire or ignites an unattended flammable target
Fire Shield (D4 Evoc): Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Shield (K4 [The Fiend] Evoc): Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Shield (S4 Evoc): Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Shield (W4 Evoc): Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Storm (C7 Evoc): R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Fire Storm (D7 Evoc): R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Fire Storm (S7 Evoc): R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Fireball (K3 [The Fiend] Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Fireball (S3 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Fireball (W3 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flame Blade (D2 Evoc): Self wields a flaming blade that inflicts 3d6+2 HP fire and emits a 10' bright light for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flame Blade (S2 Evoc): Self wields a flaming blade that inflicts 3d6+2 HP fire and emits a 10' bright light for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flame Strike (C5 Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 5d6 HP fire and 5d6 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP fire and radiant]
Flame Strike (K5 [The Fiend] Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 5d6 HP fire and 5d6 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP fire and radiant]
Flaming Sphere (D2 Conj): R60' 5' sphere emits a 20' bright light, inflicts 2d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) on creatures within 5', and ignites unattended flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to move it 30', rolling over 5' barriers and jumping 10' gaps [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flaming Sphere (S2 Conj): R60' 5' sphere emits a 20' bright light, inflicts 2d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) on creatures within 5', and ignites unattended flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to move it 30', rolling over 5' barriers and jumping 10' gaps [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flaming Sphere (W2 Conj): R60' 5' sphere emits a 20' bright light, inflicts 2d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) on creatures within 5', and ignites unattended flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to move it 30', rolling over 5' barriers and jumping 10' gaps [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flesh To Stone (D6 Tran): R60' Target becomes restrained (save Constitution negates), then petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates) for concentration; the effects become permanent after 1 min of concentration
Flesh To Stone (S6 Tran): R60' Target becomes restrained (save Constitution negates), then petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates) for concentration; the effects become permanent after 1 min of concentration
Flesh To Stone (W6 Tran): R60' Target becomes restrained (save Constitution negates), then petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates) for concentration; the effects become permanent after 1 min of concentration
Floating Disk (W1 Conj): 1
Fly (K3 Tran): Touched gains a 60' fly speed for concentration up to 10 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Fly (S3 Tran): Touched gains a 60' fly speed for concentration up to 10 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Fly (W3 Tran): Touched gains a 60' fly speed for concentration up to 10 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Fog Cloud (D1 Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Fog Cloud (R1 Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Fog Cloud (S1 Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Fog Cloud (W1 Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Forbiddance (C6 Abju): Touched 40,000 sq ft bars teleport and portals; entry inflicts 5d10 HP of a choice of radiant or necrotic to one or more choices of aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead (password negates) for 1 day; casting daily for 30 days makes the effects permanent [R]
Forcecage (B7 Evoc): R100' Creates a choice of a 20' barred force cube or a 10' solid force box that can trap creatures inside (save Charisma allows magical escape) for concentration up to 1 hr
Forcecage (K7 Evoc): R100' Creates a choice of a 20' barred force cube or a 10' solid force box that can trap creatures inside (save Charisma allows magical escape) for concentration up to 1 hr
Forcecage (W7 Evoc): R100' Creates a choice of a 20' barred force cube or a 10' solid force box that can trap creatures inside (save Charisma allows magical escape) for concentration up to 1 hr
Foresight (B9 Divi): Touched gains advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr
Foresight (D9 Divi): Touched gains advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr
Foresight (K9 Divi): Touched gains advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr
Foresight (W9 Divi): Touched gains advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr
Freedom Of Movement (B4 Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Freedom Of Movement (C4 Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Freedom Of Movement (D4 Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Freedom Of Movement (R4 Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Freezing Sphere (S6 Evoc): 1
Freezing Sphere (W6 Evoc): 1
Gaseous Form (K3 Tran): Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Gaseous Form (S3 Tran): Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Gaseous Form (W3 Tran): Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Gate (C9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Gate (K9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Gate (S9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Gate (W9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Geas (B5 Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic each day (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Geas (C5 Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic each day (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Geas (D5 Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic each day (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Geas (P5 Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic each day (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Geas (W5 Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic each day (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Gentle Repose (C2 Necr): Touched corpse becomes immune to decay and animation for 10 days [R]
Gentle Repose (P2 Necr): Touched corpse becomes immune to decay and animation for 10 days [R]
Gentle Repose (W2 Necr): Touched corpse becomes immune to decay and animation for 10 days [R]
Giant Insect (D4 Conj): R60' Summons a choice of an obedient giant centipede, spider, or wasp for concentration up to 10 min; it has Armor Class 15, 30 hit points, a 40' Speed, understanding of self languages, and 2 +2 attacks per rd that inflict 1d6+7 HP piercing and 1d4 HP poison; centipedes also have a R10' attack that inflicts poisoned for 1 rd, spiders a range 60' attack that inflicts 1d10+7 bludgeoning and loss of movement for 1 rd, and wasps a 40' fly Speed [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, number of attacks by 1 per 2 levels, piercing damage by 1, and spider's bludgeoning damage by 1]
Glibness (B8 Ench): Self can take 15 on Charisma checks and always detects as truthful for 1 hr
Glibness (K8 Ench): Self can take 15 on Charisma checks and always detects as truthful for 1 hr
Globe Of Invulnerability (S6 Abju): 10' radius blocks spells of level 5 or lower for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the level of spells blocked by 1]
Globe Of Invulnerability (W6 Abju): 10' radius blocks spells of level 5 or lower for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the level of spells blocked by 1]
Glyph Of Warding (B3 Abju): When triggered, 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder (save Dexterity half), or a spell of up to level 3 [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP or increases the level of the triggered spell by 1]
Glyph Of Warding (C3 Abju): When triggered, 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder (save Dexterity half), or a spell of up to level 3 [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP or increases the level of the triggered spell by 1]
Glyph Of Warding (W3 Abju): When triggered, 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder (save Dexterity half), or a spell of up to level 3 [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP or increases the level of the triggered spell by 1]
Goodberry (D1 Conj): Creates 10 berries that last for 24 hr; each restores 1 hit point and provides nourishment for 1 day
Goodberry (R1 Conj): Creates 10 berries that last for 24 hr; each restores 1 hit point and provides nourishment for 1 day
Grease (S1 Conj): R60' 10' sq becomes difficult terrain and causes creatures to fall prone (save Dexterity negates) for 1 min
Grease (W1 Conj): R60' 10' sq becomes difficult terrain and causes creatures to fall prone (save Dexterity negates) for 1 min
Greater Invisibility (B4 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Greater Invisibility (S4 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Greater Invisibility (W4 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Greater Restoration (B5 Abju): Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Greater Restoration (C5 Abju): Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Greater Restoration (D5 Abju): Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Greater Restoration (P5 Abju): Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Greater Restoration (R5 Abju): Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Guardian Of Faith (C4 Conj): R30' 10' radius inflicts 20 HP radiant on foes (save Dexterity half) for 8 hr or until 60 HP inflicted
Guards And Wards (B6 Abju): Multiple magic effects protect 2,500 sq ft for 24 hr
Guards And Wards (W6 Abju): Multiple magic effects protect 2,500 sq ft for 24 hr
Guidance (C0 Divi): Touched gains +1d4 on a choice of skill for concentration up to 1 min
Guidance (D0 Divi): Touched gains +1d4 on a choice of skill for concentration up to 1 min
Guiding Bolt (C1 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d6 HP radiant and gives advantage on the next attack on the target before the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Gust Of Wind (D2 Evoc): 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to redirect the wind
Gust Of Wind (R2 Evoc): 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to redirect the wind
Gust Of Wind (S2 Evoc): 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to redirect the wind
Gust Of Wind (W2 Evoc): 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to redirect the wind
Hallow (C5 Evoc): 60' radius becomes warded against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and their effects and evokes a boon or bane effect
Hallow (K5 [The Fiend] Evoc): 60' radius becomes warded against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and their effects and evokes a boon or bane effect
Hallucinatory Terrain (B4 Illu): R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Hallucinatory Terrain (D4 Illu): R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Hallucinatory Terrain (K4 Illu): R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Hallucinatory Terrain (W4 Illu): R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Harm (C6 Necr): R60' Inflicts 14d6 HP necrotic and an equal maximum hit point reduction (save Constitution half HP only)
Haste (S3 Tran): R30' Willing target gains double Speed, +2 Armor Class, advantage on Dexterity, and an additional action each turn for concentration up to 1 min and suffers 1 rd of incapacitation afterward
Haste (W3 Tran): R30' Willing target gains double Speed, +2 Armor Class, advantage on Dexterity, and an additional action each turn for concentration up to 1 min and suffers 1 rd of incapacitation afterward
Heal (C6 Abju): R60' Target regains 70 hit points and recovers from blinded, deafened, and poisoned [+Level restores +10 hit points]
Heal (D6 Abju): R60' Target regains 70 hit points and recovers from blinded, deafened, and poisoned [+Level restores +10 hit points]
Healing Word (B1 Abju): R60' Target regains 2d4+2 hit points [+Level restores +2d4 hit points]
Healing Word (C1 Abju): R60' Target regains 2d4+2 hit points [+Level restores +2d4 hit points]
Healing Word (D1 Abju): R60' Target regains 2d4+2 hit points [+Level restores +2d4 hit points]
Heat Metal (B2 Tran): R60' Touching the target metal inflicts 2d8 HP fire, plus attack and ability disadvantage if the the target is worn or held (save Constitution negates disadvantage), for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to repeat the initial damage [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Heat Metal (D2 Tran): R60' Touching the target metal inflicts 2d8 HP fire, plus attack and ability disadvantage if the the target is worn or held (save Constitution negates disadvantage), for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to repeat the initial damage [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Hellish Rebuke (K1 Evoc): R60' Cast as a reaction, inflicts 2d10 HP fire on a successful attacker (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Heroes' Feast (B6 Conj): 12 diners who consume a 1-hr meal gain resistance to poison, immunity to becoming poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Heroes' Feast (C6 Conj): 12 diners who consume a 1-hr meal gain resistance to poison, immunity to becoming poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Heroes' Feast (D6 Conj): 12 diners who consume a 1-hr meal gain resistance to poison, immunity to becoming poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Heroism (B1 Ench): Touched gains immunity to becoming frightened and +2 temporary hit points each rd for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Heroism (P1 Ench): Touched gains immunity to becoming frightened and +2 temporary hit points each rd for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hex (K1 Ench): R90' Self attacks on the target inflict +1d6 HP necrotic, and the target has disadvantage on a chosen ability, for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 4, 8, or 24 hr at level 2, 3 or 5]
Hideous Laughter (B1 Ench): 1
Hideous Laughter (K1 Ench): 1
Hideous Laughter (W1 Ench): 1

Holy Aura (C8 Abju): Targets in a 30' radius gain advantage on saves, inflict disadvantage on attackers, and blind successful fiend and undead melee attackers (save Constitution negates) until the end of its next turn for concentration up to 1 min
Hunter's Mark (R1 Divi): R90' Self inflicts +1d6 HP force on the target and gains advantage on Perception and Survival to locate it for concentration up to 1 hr; can use a bonus action to move to a different target when the current target drops to 0 hit points [+Level extends the duration to 8 or 24 hr at level 3 or 5]
Hunter's Mark (R1 [Favored Enemy] Divi): R90' Self inflicts +1d6 HP force on the target and gains advantage on Perception and Survival to locate it for concentration up to 1 hr; can use a bonus action to move to a different target when the current target drops to 0 hit points [+Level extends the duration to 8 or 24 hr at level 3 or 5]
Hypnotic Pattern (B3 Illu): R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects
Hypnotic Pattern (K3 Illu): R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects

Ice Knife (D1 Conj): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 1d10 HP piercing on a hit and 2d6 HP cold in a 5' radius (save Dexterity negates cold) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP cold]
Ice Knife (S1 Conj): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 1d10 HP piercing on a hit and 2d6 HP cold in a 5' radius (save Dexterity negates cold) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP cold]

Ice Storm (D4 Evoc): R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP bludgeoning]
Ice Storm (S4 Evoc): R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP bludgeoning]

Identify (B1 Divi): Touch reveals the magic properties of an item or the spells affecting a creature [R]
Identify (W1 Divi): Touch reveals the magic properties of an item or the spells affecting a creature [R]
Illusory Script (B1 Illu): Alters the appearance of self writing on the target material, making its meaning clear only to specified creatures and those with truesight, for 10 days [R]
Illusory Script (K1 Illu): Alters the appearance of self writing on the target material, making its meaning clear only to specified creatures and those with truesight, for 10 days [R]

Imprisonment (K9 Abju): R30' Restrains the target in a chosen type of prison (save Wisdom negates and gives the target 24 hr immunity)
Imprisonment (W9 Abju): R30' Restrains the target in a chosen type of prison (save Wisdom negates and gives the target 24 hr immunity)
Incendiary Cloud (D8 Conj): R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half), obscures, and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 1 min

Incendiary Cloud (W8 Conj): R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half), obscures, and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Inflict Wounds (C1 Necr): Touch inflicts 2d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Insect Plague (C5 Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Insect Plague (D5 Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]

Invisibility (B2 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Invisibility (K2 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Invisibility (S2 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]

Irresistible Dance (B6 Ench): 1
Irresistible Dance (W6 Ench): 1
Jump (D1 Tran): Touched can jump 30' after a 10' move for 1 min
Jump (R1 Tran): Touched can jump 30' after a 10' move for 1 min
Jump (S1 Tran): Touched can jump 30' after a 10' move for 1 min
Jump (W1 Tran): Touched can jump 30' after a 10' move for 1 min
Knock (B2 Tran): R60' Unlocks, unsticks, or unbars the target or suppresses Arcane Lock for 10 min

Knock (W2 Tran): R60' Unlocks, unsticks, or unbars the target or suppresses Arcane Lock for 10 min
Legend Lore (B5 Divi): Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Legend Lore (C5 Divi): Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Legend Lore (W5 Divi): Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Lesser Restoration (B2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Lesser Restoration (C2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Lesser Restoration (D2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Lesser Restoration (P2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Lesser Restoration (R2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Levitate (S2 Tran): R60' Target 500 lb object or creature rises 20' (save Constitution negates) and can be moved up or down 20' each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Levitate (W2 Tran): R60' Target 500 lb object or creature rises 20' (save Constitution negates) and can be moved up or down 20' each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Light (B0 Evoc): Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Light (C0 Evoc): Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Light (S0 Evoc): Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Light (W0 Evoc): Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Lightning Bolt (S3 Evoc): 100'x5' line inflicts 8d6 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Lightning Bolt (W3 Evoc): 100'x5' line inflicts 8d6 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Locate Animals Or Plants (B2 Divi): Reveals the location within 5 miles of a specified kind of beast or plant [R]
Locate Animals Or Plants (D2 Divi): Reveals the location within 5 miles of a specified kind of beast or plant [R]
Locate Animals Or Plants (R2 Divi): Reveals the location within 5 miles of a specified kind of beast or plant [R]
Locate Creature (B4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell

Locate Creature (W4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Object (B2 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
Locate Object (C2 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell

Longstrider (B1 Tran): Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Longstrider (D1 Tran): Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Longstrider (R1 Tran): Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Longstrider (W1 Tran): Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Mage Armor (S1 Abju): Willing, unarmored touched gains Armor Class 13 + Dexterity modifier for 8 hr; the spell ends if the target dons armor
Mage Armor (W1 Abju): Willing, unarmored touched gains Armor Class 13 + Dexterity modifier for 8 hr; the spell ends if the target dons armor
Mage Hand (B0 Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Mage Hand (K0 Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Mage Hand (S0 Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Mage Hand (W0 Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Magic Circle (C3 Abju): R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr [+Level extends the duration +1 hr]
Magic Circle (K3 Abju): R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr [+Level extends the duration +1 hr]
Magic Circle (P3 Abju): R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr [+Level extends the duration +1 hr]
Magic Circle (W3 Abju): R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr [+Level extends the duration +1 hr]
Magic Jar (W6 Necr): R100' Moves self soul to a prepared jar from which it can possess a target's body and trap its soul in the jar (save Charisma negates for 24 hr)
Magic Missile (S1 Evoc): R120' 3 darts inflict 1d4+1 HP force each [+Level creates +1 dart]
Magic Missile (W1 Evoc): R120' 3 darts inflict 1d4+1 HP force each [+Level creates +1 dart]
Magic Mouth (B2 Illu): R30' Target object speaks a 25-word message when triggered [R]
Magic Mouth (W2 Illu): R30' Target object speaks a 25-word message when triggered [R]
Magic Weapon (P2 Tran): Touched weapon gains a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr [+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6]
Magic Weapon (R2 Tran): Touched weapon gains a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr [+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6]
Magic Weapon (S2 Tran): Touched weapon gains a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr [+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6]
Magic Weapon (W2 Tran): Touched weapon gains a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr [+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6]
Magnificent Mansion (B7 Conj): 1
Magnificent Mansion (W7 Conj): 1
Major Image (B3 Illu): R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4]
Major Image (K3 Illu): R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4]
Major Image (S3 Illu): R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4]
Major Image (W3 Illu): R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4]
Mass Cure Wounds (B5 Abju): R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+2 HP [+Level restores +1d8 HP]
Mass Cure Wounds (C5 Abju): R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+2 HP [+Level restores +1d8 HP]
Mass Cure Wounds (D5 Abju): R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+2 HP [+Level restores +1d8 HP]
Mass Heal (C9 Abju): R60' Targets regain 700 HP total and recover from blinded, deafened, and poisoned
Mass Healing Word (B3 Abju): R60' 6 targets regain 2d4+2 HP [+Level restores +1d4 HP]
Mass Healing Word (C3 Abju): R60' 6 targets regain 2d4+2 HP [+Level restores +1d4 HP]
Mass Suggestion (B6 Ench): R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr; damage from self or any ally ends the effects [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9]
Mass Suggestion (S6 Ench): R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr; damage from self or any ally ends the effects [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9]
Mass Suggestion (W6 Ench): R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr; damage from self or any ally ends the effects [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9]
Maze (W8 Conj): R60' Sends the target to a labyrinthine demiplane (save DC 20 Investigation escapes) for concentration up to 10 min
Meld Into Stone (C3 Tran): Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP force, expulsion, and prone to self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Meld Into Stone (D3 Tran): Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP force, expulsion, and prone to self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Meld Into Stone (R3 Tran): Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP force, expulsion, and prone to self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Mending (B0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Mending (C0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Mending (D0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Mending (S0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Mending (W0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Message (B0 Tran): R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 1' of wood, stone, or metal or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Message (D0 Tran): R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 1' of wood, stone, or metal or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell

Meteor Swarm (S9 Evoc): R1 mile 4 40' radius areas each inflict 20d6 HP fire and 20d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Meteor Swarm (W9 Evoc): R1 mile 4 40' radius areas each inflict 20d6 HP fire and 20d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Mind Blank (B8 Abju): Touched gains immunity to psychic damage, emotion and thought detection, divination, and charm for 24 hr
Mind Blank (W8 Abju): Touched gains immunity to psychic damage, emotion and thought detection, divination, and charm for 24 hr
Mind Spike (K2 Divi): R120' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Mind Spike (S2 Divi): R120' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Mind Spike (W2 Divi): R120' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]

Mirage Arcane (B7 Illu): Creates 1 mile sq of illusionary terrain for 10 days
Mirage Arcane (D7 Illu): Creates 1 mile sq of illusionary terrain for 10 days
Mirage Arcane (W7 Illu): Creates 1 mile sq of illusionary terrain for 10 days
Mirror Image (B2 Illu): 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Mirror Image (K2 Illu): 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Mirror Image (S2 Illu): 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Mirror Image (W2 Illu): 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Mislead (B5 Illu): Makes self invisible and creates an illusory duplicate that can move 60' and share senses for concentration up to 1 hr; attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends the invisibility
Mislead (K5 Illu): Makes self invisible and creates an illusory duplicate that can move 60' and share senses for concentration up to 1 hr; attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends the invisibility
Mislead (W5 Illu): Makes self invisible and creates an illusory duplicate that can move 60' and share senses for concentration up to 1 hr; attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends the invisibility
Misty Step (K2 Conj): Teleports self 30'
Misty Step (S2 Conj): Teleports self 30'
Misty Step (W2 Conj): Teleports self 30'
Modify Memory (B5 Ench): R30' Incapacitates the target for concentration up to 1 min and allows changing the target's memory of a 10-min event from the past 24 hr (save Wisdom negates; a target in battle has advantage); damaging or additional casting on the target ends the spell [+Level changes the memory of an event from the past 7, 30, 365, or unlimited days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]
Modify Memory (W5 Ench): R30' Incapacitates the target for concentration up to 1 min and allows changing the target's memory of a 10-min event from the past 24 hr (save Wisdom negates; a target in battle has advantage); damaging or additional casting on the target ends the spell [+Level changes the memory of an event from the past 7, 30, 365, or unlimited days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]
Moonbeam (D2 Evoc): R120' 5' radius inflicts 2d10 HP radiant (save Constitution half; shapechangers revert form on failure) and can move 60' per rd for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Move Earth (D6 Tran): R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 minutes for concentration up to 2 hr
Move Earth (S6 Tran): R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 minutes for concentration up to 2 hr
Move Earth (W6 Tran): R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 minutes for concentration up to 2 hr
Nondetection (B3 Abju): Willing touched or touched 10'-long object gains immunity to divination for 8 hr
Nondetection (R3 Abju): Willing touched or touched 10'-long object gains immunity to divination for 8 hr
Nondetection (W3 Abju): Willing touched or touched 10'-long object gains immunity to divination for 8 hr
Pass Without Trace (D2 Abju): Targets in a 30' radius gain +10 Stealth and leave no tracks for concentration up to 1 hr
Pass Without Trace (R2 Abju): Targets in a 30' radius gain +10 Stealth and leave no tracks for concentration up to 1 hr
Passwall (W5 Tran): R30' Creates a 5'x8'x20' passage through wood, plaster, or stone for 1 hr
Phantasmal Force (B2 Illu): R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Phantasmal Force (K2 [The Archfey] Illu): R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Phantasmal Force (K2 [The Great Old One] Illu): R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min

Phantasmal Killer (B4 Illu): R120' Target perceives a personal horror that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks and 4d10 HP psychic per rd (save Wisdom half initial HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Phantasmal Killer (W4 Illu): R120' Target perceives a personal horror that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks and 4d10 HP psychic per rd (save Wisdom half initial HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Phantom Steed (W3 Illu): R30' Conjures a mount that can be ridden by a designated creature 100' per rd (13 MPH) for 1 hr or until damaged [R]
Planar Ally (C6 Conj): R60' Summons a servant of an otherworldly entity to bargain for aid
Planar Binding (B5 Abju): R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]
Planar Binding (C5 Abju): R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]

Plane Shift (S7 Conj): Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Plane Shift (W7 Conj): Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Plant Growth (B3 Tran): R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 365 days
Plant Growth (D3 Tran): R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 365 days
Plant Growth (R3 Tran): R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 365 days

Poison Spray (W0 Necr): R30' Ranged spell inflicts 3d12 HP poison
Polymorph (B4 Tran): R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast, with temporary hit points appropriate to the beast, (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 temporary hit points
Polymorph (D4 Tran): R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast, with temporary hit points appropriate to the beast, (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 temporary hit points
