Power Word Heal (B9 Ench): R60' Target regains all hit points, recovers from charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, and stunned, and can use a reaction to stand from prone
Power Word Heal (C9 Ench): R60' Target regains all hit points, recovers from charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, and stunned, and can use a reaction to stand from prone
Power Word Kill (B9 Ench): R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Kill (K9 Ench): R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Kill (S9 Ench): R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Kill (W9 Ench): R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Stun (B8 Ench): R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others are have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Power Word Stun (K8 Ench): R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others are have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Power Word Stun (S8 Ench): R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others are have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Power Word Stun (W8 Ench): R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others are have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Prayer Of Healing (C2 Evoc): R30' 5 targets gain the benefits of a short rest and regain 2d8 hit points after 10 min of casting; additional castings have no effect on a target until it completes a long rest [+Level restores +1d8 hit points]
Prayer Of Healing (P2 Evoc): R30' 5 targets gain the benefits of a short rest and regain 2d8 hit points after 10 min of casting; additional castings have no effect on a target until it completes a long rest [+Level restores +1d8 hit points]
Prestidigitation (B0 Tran): R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Prestidigitation (K0 Tran): R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Prestidigitation (S0 Tran): R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Prestidigitation (W0 Tran): R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Prismatic Spray (B7 Evoc): 60' cone randomly inflicts one of: 12d6 HP fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold (save Dexterity half); restrained (save Dexterity negates) and petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates); blinded (save Dexterity negates) and banished to another plane (save Wisdom negates) at the start of the next turn; 2 of the preceding effects
Prismatic Spray (S7 Evoc): 60' cone randomly inflicts one of: 12d6 HP fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold (save Dexterity half); restrained (save Dexterity negates) and petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates); blinded (save Dexterity negates) and banished to another plane (save Wisdom negates) at the start of the next turn; 2 of the preceding effects
Prismatic Spray (W7 Evoc): 60' cone randomly inflicts one of: 12d6 HP fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold (save Dexterity half); restrained (save Dexterity negates) and petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates); blinded (save Dexterity negates) and banished to another plane (save Wisdom negates) at the start of the next turn; 2 of the preceding effects
Prismatic Wall (B9 Abju): R60' 90'x30'x1" wall or 15' radius sphere emits 100' bright light and blinds for 1 min non-designated creatures within 20' (save Constitution negates) for 10 min; creatures passing through suffer 12d6 HP each fire, acid, lightning, poison, and cold (save Dexterity half), restraint (save Dexterity negates) and petrification after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates), and blindness (save Dexterity negates) and banishment to another plane (save Wisdom negates) at the start of the next turn
Prismatic Wall (W9 Abju): R60' 90'x30'x1" wall or 15' radius sphere emits 100' bright light and blinds for 1 min non-designated creatures within 20' (save Constitution negates) for 10 min; creatures passing through suffer 12d6 HP each fire, acid, lightning, poison, and cold (save Dexterity half), restraint (save Dexterity negates) and petrification after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates), and blindness (save Dexterity negates) and banishment to another plane (save Wisdom negates) at the start of the next turn
Private Sanctum (W4 Abju): 1
Produce Flame (D0 Conj): Emits bright light in a 10' radius for 10 min; allows a R60' ranged spell attack each rd that inflicts 3d8 HP fire
Programmed Illusion (B6 Illu): R120' Creates a 30' cube illusion when triggered (Investigation detects), with a 10 min pause between triggers
Programmed Illusion (W6 Illu): R120' Creates a 30' cube illusion when triggered (Investigation detects), with a 10 min pause between triggers
Project Image (B7 Illu): R500 miles Self can see, hear, and speak through an illusory double (Investigation detects) created in a familiar place for concentration up to 1 day or until it suffers damage
Project Image (W7 Illu): R500 miles Self can see, hear, and speak through an illusory double (Investigation detects) created in a familiar place for concentration up to 1 day or until it suffers damage
Protection From Energy (C3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Energy (D3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Energy (R3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr

Protection From Energy (W3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Evil And Good (C1 Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Evil And Good (D1 Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Evil And Good (K1 Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Evil And Good (P1 Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Evil And Good (W1 Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Poison (C2 Abju): Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Protection From Poison (D2 Abju): Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Protection From Poison (P2 Abju): Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Protection From Poison (R2 Abju): Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Purify Food And Drink (C1 Tran): R10' Removes poison and disease from nonmagical food and drink in a 5' radius [R]
Purify Food And Drink (D1 Tran): R10' Removes poison and disease from nonmagical food and drink in a 5' radius [R]
Purify Food And Drink (P1 Tran): R10' Removes poison and disease from nonmagical food and drink in a 5' radius [R]
Raise Dead (B5 Necr): Restores life with 1 hit point to and removes poisons from a willing touched 10-day-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest
Raise Dead (C5 Necr): Restores life with 1 hit point to and removes poisons from a willing touched 10-day-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest
Raise Dead (P5 Necr): Restores life with 1 hit point to and removes poisons from a willing touched 10-day-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest
Ray Of Enfeeblement (K2 Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d8 damage with Strength weapons (save Constitution disadvantage on the first attack before the start of the next turn only; additional saves each rd ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Ray Of Enfeeblement (W2 Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d8 damage with Strength weapons (save Constitution disadvantage on the first attack before the start of the next turn only; additional saves each rd ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Ray Of Frost (S0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Ray Of Frost (W0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Ray Of Sickness (S1 Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Ray Of Sickness (W1 Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Regenerate (B7 Tran): Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and regrows severed parts after 2 min
Regenerate (C7 Tran): Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and regrows severed parts after 2 min
Regenerate (D7 Tran): Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and regrows severed parts after 2 min
Reincarnate (D5 Necr): Resurrects the willing soul of a touched 10-day-old corpse in a new body
Remove Curse (C3 Abju): Frees a touched creature from all curses or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Remove Curse (K3 Abju): Frees a touched creature from all curses or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Remove Curse (P3 Abju): Frees a touched creature from all curses or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Remove Curse (W3 Abju): Frees a touched creature from all curses or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Resilient Sphere (W4 Abju): 1
Resistance (C0 Abju): Touched reduces by 1d4 HP any damage taken from a choice of acid, bludgeoning, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, piercing, poison, radiant, slashing, or thunder for concentration up to 1 min
Resistance (D0 Abju): Touched reduces by 1d4 HP any damage taken from a choice of acid, bludgeoning, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, piercing, poison, radiant, slashing, or thunder for concentration up to 1 min
Resurrection (B7 Necr): Restores life with full hit points to and removes poisons, wounds, and maims from a willing touched 100-year-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest; use on a corpse dead 365 days or more inflicts on self loss of spellcasting and disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and saves until the next long rest
Resurrection (C7 Necr): Restores life with full hit points to and removes poisons, wounds, and maims from a willing touched 100-year-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest; use on a corpse dead 365 days or more inflicts on self loss of spellcasting and disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and saves until the next long rest
Reverse Gravity (D7 Tran): R100' Items in a 100'x100' cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Reverse Gravity (S7 Tran): R100' Items in a 100'x100' cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Reverse Gravity (W7 Tran): R100' Items in a 100'x100' cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Revivify (C3 Necr): Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-minute-old corpse
Revivify (D3 Necr): Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-minute-old corpse
Revivify (P3 Necr): Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-minute-old corpse
Revivify (R3 Necr): Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-minute-old corpse
Rope Trick (W2 Tran): Touched rope leads to an extradimensional space with room for 8 creatures for 1 hr
Sacred Flame (C0 Evoc): R60' Inflicts 3d8 HP radiant (save Dexterity negates), ignoring 1/2 and 3/4 cover
Sanctuary (C1 Abju): R30' Foes of the target cannot attack it (save Wisdom negates) for 1 min; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends
Scorching Ray (K2 [The Fiend] Evoc): R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire [+Level gives +1 ranged attack]
Scorching Ray (S2 Evoc): R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire [+Level gives +1 ranged attack]
Scorching Ray (W2 Evoc): R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire [+Level gives +1 ranged attack]
Scrying (B5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Scrying (C5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Scrying (D5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Scrying (K5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Scrying (W5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Searing Smite (P1 Evoc): Cast as a bonus action after a successful self melee attack, inflicts +1d6 HP fire, plus 1d6 HP fire per rd (save Constitution ends) for 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP initial and per rd]
Secret Chest (W4 Conj): 1
See Invisibility (B2 Divi): Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
See Invisibility (S2 Divi): Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
See Invisibility (W2 Divi): Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
Seeming (B5 Illu): R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Seeming (S5 Illu): R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Seeming (W5 Illu): R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Sending (B3 Evoc): Self can exchange a pair of 25-word messages with a familiar target
Sending (C3 Evoc): Self can exchange a pair of 25-word messages with a familiar target
Sending (W3 Evoc): Self can exchange a pair of 25-word messages with a familiar target
Sequester (W7 Tran): Touched object or willing creature becomes invisible and hidden from divination and enters a state of suspended animation until a specified trigger
Shapechange (D9 Tran): Allows self to polymorph repeatedly into familiar living creatures of equal or lesser CR, initially gaining temporary hit points of the first creature, for concentration up to 1 hr
Shapechange (W9 Tran): Allows self to polymorph repeatedly into familiar living creatures of equal or lesser CR, initially gaining temporary hit points of the first creature, for concentration up to 1 hr
Shatter (B2 Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d8 HP thunder (save Constitution half; constructs have disadvantage) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Shatter (S2 Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d8 HP thunder (save Constitution half; constructs have disadvantage) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Shatter (W2 Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d8 HP thunder (save Constitution half; constructs have disadvantage) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Shield (S1 Abju): Cast as a reaction upon taking damage, gives self +5 Armor Class and immunity to Magic Missile until the start of the next turn
Shield (W1 Abju): Cast as a reaction upon taking damage, gives self +5 Armor Class and immunity to Magic Missile until the start of the next turn
Shield Of Faith (C1 Abju): R60' Target gains +2 Armor Class for concentration up to 10 min
Shield Of Faith (P1 Abju): R60' Target gains +2 Armor Class for concentration up to 10 min
Shillelagh (D0 Tran): Held club gains +4 attacks that inflict 1d12+2 HP of a choice of force or weapon damage for 1 min
Shining Smite (P2 Tran): Cast as a bonus action after a successful self melee attack, inflicts +2d6 HP radiant and causes the target to emit a 5' bright light, negating invisibility and giving its foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Shocking Grasp (S0 Evoc): Touch inflicts 3d8 HP lightning and loss of opportunity attacks until its next turn
Shocking Grasp (W0 Evoc): Touch inflicts 3d8 HP lightning and loss of opportunity attacks until its next turn
Silence (B2 Illu): R120' 20' radius blocks sound for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Silence (C2 Illu): R120' 20' radius blocks sound for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Silence (R2 Illu): R120' 20' radius blocks sound for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Silent Image (B1 Illu): R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Silent Image (S1 Illu): R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Silent Image (W1 Illu): R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Simulacrum (W7 Illu): Uses snow to create an obedient copy of a nearby target creature with half its hit points
Sleep (B1 Ench): R60' Each target in a 5' radius becomes incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) until the end of its next turn, then unconscious (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min (damage or shaking awakens)
Sleep (S1 Ench): R60' Each target in a 5' radius becomes incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) until the end of its next turn, then unconscious (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min (damage or shaking awakens)
Sleep (W1 Ench): R60' Each target in a 5' radius becomes incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) until the end of its next turn, then unconscious (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min (damage or shaking awakens)
Sleet Storm (D3 Conj): R150' 20' radius obscures, douses exposed flames, and inflicts difficult terrain and prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Sleet Storm (S3 Conj): R150' 20' radius obscures, douses exposed flames, and inflicts difficult terrain and prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Sleet Storm (W3 Conj): R150' 20' radius obscures, douses exposed flames, and inflicts difficult terrain and prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Slow (B3 Tran): R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action per turn, and a 25% chance of somatic spell failure (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Slow (S3 Tran): R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action per turn, and a 25% chance of somatic spell failure (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Slow (W3 Tran): R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action per turn, and a 25% chance of somatic spell failure (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Sorcerous Burst (S0 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, psychic, or thunder; rolled 8s on the damage each inflict +1d8 HP, to a maximum of +2d8 HP
Spare The Dying (C0 Necr): R60' Target dying creature becomes stable
Spare The Dying (D0 Necr): R60' Target dying creature becomes stable
Speak With Animals (B1 Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (D1 Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (K1 Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (R1 Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (R1 [Druidic] Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Dead (B3 Necr): R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Speak With Dead (C3 Necr): R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Speak With Dead (W3 Necr): R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Speak With Plants (B3 Tran): Self can talk with and command plants in a 30' radius for 10 min
Speak With Plants (D3 Tran): Self can talk with and command plants in a 30' radius for 10 min
Speak With Plants (R3 Tran): Self can talk with and command plants in a 30' radius for 10 min
Spider Climb (K2 Tran): Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Spider Climb (S2 Tran): Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Spider Climb (W2 Tran): Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Spike Growth (D2 Tran): R150' 20' radius becomes difficult terrain and inflicts 2d4 HP piercing per 5' movement for concentration up to 10 min
Spike Growth (R2 Tran): R150' 20' radius becomes difficult terrain and inflicts 2d4 HP piercing per 5' movement for concentration up to 10 min
Spirit Guardians (C3 Conj): 15' radius inflicts 3d8 HP necrotic or radiant (save Wisdom half) and half Speed on non-designated creatures for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Spiritual Weapon (C2 Evoc): R60' Creates a spectral weapon that inflicts 1d8+2 HP force and can move 20' and attack as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Starry Wisp (B0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP radiant and a dim glow until the end of the next turn
Starry Wisp (D0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP radiant and a dim glow until the end of the next turn
Stinking Cloud (B3 Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stinking Cloud (K3 [The Fiend] Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stinking Cloud (S3 Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stinking Cloud (W3 Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stone Shape (C4 Tran): Reshapes touched 5' cube of stone
Stone Shape (D4 Tran): Reshapes touched 5' cube of stone
Stone Shape (W4 Tran): Reshapes touched 5' cube of stone
Stoneskin (D4 Tran): Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Stoneskin (R4 Tran): Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Stoneskin (S4 Tran): Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Stoneskin (W4 Tran): Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Storm Of Vengeance (D9 Conj): 300' radius within 1 mile inflicts 2d6 HP thunder and deafness (save Constitution negates), then 4d6 HP acid, then 10d6 HP lightning (6 targets; save Dexterity half), then 2d6 HP bludgeoning, then 1d6 HP cold per rd, difficult terrain, and no ranged attacks for concentration up to 1 min
Suggestion (B2 Ench): R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Suggestion (K2 Ench): R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Suggestion (S2 Ench): R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Suggestion (W2 Ench): R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Summon Dragon (W5 Conj): R60' Summons an obedient draconic spirit for concentration up to 1 hr; it has Armor Class 19, 50 hit points, 30' Speed, 60' fly Speed, 30' swim Speed, 2 attacks per rd that inflict 1d6 + 9 HP piercing, a breath weapon that inflicts 2d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison in a 30' cone, and resistance to the same damage type; self also gains this resistance [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, number of attacks by 1 per 2 levels, and piercing damage by 1]
Sunbeam (C6 Evoc): 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd for concentration up to 1 min
Sunbeam (D6 Evoc): 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd for concentration up to 1 min
Sunbeam (S6 Evoc): 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd for concentration up to 1 min
Sunbeam (W6 Evoc): 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd for concentration up to 1 min
Sunburst (C8 Evoc): R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; an additional save each turn ends blindness)
Sunburst (D8 Evoc): R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; an additional save each turn ends blindness)
Sunburst (S8 Evoc): R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; an additional save each turn ends blindness)
Sunburst (W8 Evoc): R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; an additional save each turn ends blindness)
Symbol (B7 Abju): Inscribes a touched object with a permanent glyph that, when triggered, inflicts a choice of harmful magic effect: 10d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half); arguing for 1 min that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks (save Wisdom negates); frightened and fleeing for 1 min (save Wisdom negates); incapacitated by pain for 1 min (save Constitution negates); asleep for 10 min or until shaken or harmed (save Wisdom negates); stunned for 1 min (save Wisdom negates)
Symbol (C7 Abju): Inscribes a touched object with a permanent glyph that, when triggered, inflicts a choice of harmful magic effect: 10d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half); arguing for 1 min that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks (save Wisdom negates); frightened and fleeing for 1 min (save Wisdom negates); incapacitated by pain for 1 min (save Constitution negates); asleep for 10 min or until shaken or harmed (save Wisdom negates); stunned for 1 min (save Wisdom negates)
Symbol (D7 Abju): Inscribes a touched object with a permanent glyph that, when triggered, inflicts a choice of harmful magic effect: 10d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half); arguing for 1 min that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks (save Wisdom negates); frightened and fleeing for 1 min (save Wisdom negates); incapacitated by pain for 1 min (save Constitution negates); asleep for 10 min or until shaken or harmed (save Wisdom negates); stunned for 1 min (save Wisdom negates)
Symbol (W7 Abju): Inscribes a touched object with a permanent glyph that, when triggered, inflicts a choice of harmful magic effect: 10d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half); arguing for 1 min that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks (save Wisdom negates); frightened and fleeing for 1 min (save Wisdom negates); incapacitated by pain for 1 min (save Constitution negates); asleep for 10 min or until shaken or harmed (save Wisdom negates); stunned for 1 min (save Wisdom negates)
Telekinesis (S5 Tran): R60' Self can mentally restrain and move 1 Huge creature or object 30' (save Strength negates) each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Telekinesis (W5 Tran): R60' Self can mentally restrain and move 1 Huge creature or object 30' (save Strength negates) each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Telepathic Bond (B5 Divi): 1
Telepathic Bond (W5 Divi): 1
Teleport (B7 Conj): R10' Teleports an unattended Large or smaller object or self and 8 willing creatures any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
Teleport (S7 Conj): R10' Teleports an unattended Large or smaller object or self and 8 willing creatures any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
Teleport (W7 Conj): R10' Teleports an unattended Large or smaller object or self and 8 willing creatures any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
Teleportation Circle (B5 Conj): R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Teleportation Circle (K5 Conj): R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Teleportation Circle (S5 Conj): R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Teleportation Circle (W5 Conj): R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Thaumaturgy (C0 Tran): R30' Creates a minor magic effect: a booming voice for 1 min; a modification of flames for 1 min; harmless ground tremors for 1 min; an illusory sound; movement of a door or window; a change in eye appearance for 1 min
Thunderwave (B1 Evoc): 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Thunderwave (D1 Evoc): 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Thunderwave (S1 Evoc): 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Thunderwave (W1 Evoc): 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Time Stop (S9 Tran): Self can take 1d4+1 turns while no time passes for others; affecting another creature or moving more than 1000' away ends
Time Stop (W9 Tran): Self can take 1d4+1 turns while no time passes for others; affecting another creature or moving more than 1000' away ends
Tiny Hut (B3 Evoc): 1
Tiny Hut (W3 Evoc): 1
Tongues (B3 Divi): Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Tongues (C3 Divi): Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Tongues (K3 Divi): Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Tongues (S3 Divi): Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Tongues (W3 Divi): Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Transport Via Plants (D6 Conj): R10' Allows creatures to use 5' of movement to teleport any distance from the targeted Large plant to a specified familiar Large plant for 1 min
Tree Stride (D5 Conj): Allows self to use 10' of movement to teleport 500' between like trees once per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Tree Stride (R5 Conj): Allows self to use 10' of movement to teleport 500' between like trees once per rd for concentration up to 1 min
True Polymorph (B9 Tran): R30' Transforms the target creature into another creature or object (save Wisdom negates), or the target object into a creature, for concentration up to 1 hr; concentrating for a full hr makes the change permanent
True Polymorph (K9 Tran): R30' Transforms the target creature into another creature or object (save Wisdom negates), or the target object into a creature, for concentration up to 1 hr; concentrating for a full hr makes the change permanent
True Polymorph (W9 Tran): R30' Transforms the target creature into another creature or object (save Wisdom negates), or the target object into a creature, for concentration up to 1 hr; concentrating for a full hr makes the change permanent
True Resurrection (C9 Necr): Restores life and full hit points to and removes all diseases, poisons, wounds, and curses from a willing touched corpse or named creature dead up to 200 years
True Resurrection (D9 Necr): Restores life and full hit points to and removes all diseases, poisons, wounds, and curses from a willing touched corpse or named creature dead up to 200 years
True Seeing (B6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
True Seeing (C6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
True Seeing (K6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
True Seeing (S6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
True Seeing (W6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
True Strike (B0 Divi): Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +4 attack bonus and inflicts +2d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
True Strike (K0 Divi): Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +4 attack bonus and inflicts +2d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
True Strike (S0 Divi): Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +4 attack bonus and inflicts +2d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
True Strike (W0 Divi): Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +4 attack bonus and inflicts +2d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
Tsunami (D8 Conj): R1 mile 300'x300'x50' wall of water inflicts 5d10 HP bludgeoning (save Strength half); it moves away 50' per rd, reducing its height by 50' and its damage by 1d10 HP each rd, for concentration up to 6 rd
Unseen Servant (B1 Conj): R60' Creates an invisible force with Armor Class 10, 1 hit point, and Strength 2; a bonus action each rd can move it 15' and use it to perform simple tasks for 1 hr or until it is damaged [R]
Unseen Servant (K1 Conj): R60' Creates an invisible force with Armor Class 10, 1 hit point, and Strength 2; a bonus action each rd can move it 15' and use it to perform simple tasks for 1 hr or until it is damaged [R]
Unseen Servant (W1 Conj): R60' Creates an invisible force with Armor Class 10, 1 hit point, and Strength 2; a bonus action each rd can move it 15' and use it to perform simple tasks for 1 hr or until it is damaged [R]
Vampiric Touch (K3 Necr): Touch inflicts 3d6 HP necrotic, and self regains half as many hit points, for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Vampiric Touch (S3 Necr): Touch inflicts 3d6 HP necrotic, and self regains half as many hit points, for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Vampiric Touch (W3 Necr): Touch inflicts 3d6 HP necrotic, and self regains half as many hit points, for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Vicious Mockery (B0 Ench): R60' Target suffers 3d6 HP psychic and disadvantage on its next attack before the end of its next turn (save Wisdom negates)
Vitriolic Sphere (S4 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d4 HP acid, then 5d4 HP acid at the end of each affected creature's next turn (save Dexterity half initial HP only) [+Level inflicts +2d4 HP initial]
Vitriolic Sphere (W4 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d4 HP acid, then 5d4 HP acid at the end of each affected creature's next turn (save Dexterity half initial HP only) [+Level inflicts +2d4 HP initial]
Wall Of Fire (D4 Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Wall Of Fire (K4 [The Fiend] Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Wall Of Fire (S4 Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Wall Of Fire (W4 Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Wall Of Force (W5 Evoc): R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10' impassable force panels or a 10' radius impassible force dome or globe for concentration up to 10 min; the effect extends into the ethereal plane
Wall Of Ice (W6 Evoc): R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x1' panels or a 10' radius dome or globe, with Armor Class 12 and 30 hit points per section, that inflicts 10d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) initially and, if broken, 5d6 HP cold to creatures passing through (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +2d6 HP initial and +1d6 HP when passing]
Wall Of Stone (D5 Evoc): R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity avoids entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Wall Of Stone (S5 Evoc): R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity avoids entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Wall Of Stone (W5 Evoc): R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity avoids entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Wall Of Thorns (D6 Conj): R120' Creates a 60'x10'x5' wall or a 20'x20'x5' ring that inflicts 7d8 HP piercing (save Dexterity half) initially, plus 1/4 Speed and 7d8 HP slashing to creatures passing through (save Dexterity half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Warding Bond (C2 Abju): Willing touched gains +1 Armor Class, +1 saves, and resistance to all damage, and any damage to the target also affects self, for 1 hr or until separated from self by more than 60'
Warding Bond (P2 Abju): Willing touched gains +1 Armor Class, +1 saves, and resistance to all damage, and any damage to the target also affects self, for 1 hr or until separated from self by more than 60'
Water Breathing (D3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Breathing (R3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Breathing (S3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Breathing (W3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Walk (C3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Water Walk (D3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Water Walk (R3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Water Walk (S3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Web (S2 Conj): R60' 20' cube inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Dexterity negates; Athletics frees) for concentration up to 1 hr; burning the web inflicts 2d4 HP fire
Web (W2 Conj): R60' 20' cube inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Dexterity negates; Athletics frees) for concentration up to 1 hr; burning the web inflicts 2d4 HP fire
Weird (K9 Illu): R120' 30' radius inflicts frightened and 10d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom half HP only), then 5d10 HP psychic each rd (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Weird (W9 Illu): R120' 30' radius inflicts frightened and 10d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom half HP only), then 5d10 HP psychic each rd (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Wind Walk (D6 Tran): R30' Self and 10 willing others can become gaseous, gaining a 300' fly Speed and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, at will for 8 hr; converting to or from gas inflicts stunned for 1 min
Wind Wall (D3 Evoc): R120' Creates a 50'x15'x1' area that inflicts 4d8 HP bludgeoning (save Strength half) and deflects lightweight creatures, objects, and projectiles for concentration up to 1 min
Wind Wall (R3 Evoc): R120' Creates a 50'x15'x1' area that inflicts 4d8 HP bludgeoning (save Strength half) and deflects lightweight creatures, objects, and projectiles for concentration up to 1 min
Wish (S9 Conj): Mimics an 8th level spell or alters reality with few limits; casting to alter reality reduces Strength to 3 for 2d4 days and causes later spellcasting before a long rest to inflict 1d10 HP necrotic per spell level
Wish (W9 Conj): Mimics an 8th level spell or alters reality with few limits; casting to alter reality reduces Strength to 3 for 2d4 days and causes later spellcasting before a long rest to inflict 1d10 HP necrotic per spell level
Word Of Recall (C6 Conj): R5' Teleports self and 5 others to a prepared location
Zone Of Truth (B2 Ench): R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Zone Of Truth (C2 Ench): R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Zone Of Truth (P2 Ench): R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Magic Notes:
Blessed Warrior: Knows 2 Cleric cantrips; can replace 1 of them when gaining a Paladin level
Eldritch Invocations: 3 selections
Magician: Knows +1 Druid cantrip
Arcane Recovery: Can recover 1 spell slot level (level 5 maximum) at the end of a short rest once per long rest
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect 2 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Eldritch Spear: Increases the range of a chosen ranged Warlock cantrip by 60'
Favored Enemy: Can cast Hunter's Mark 2 times per long rest
Font Of Magic: Can use 2 Sorcery Points per long rest, convert spell slots to Sorcery Points, and use a bonus action to convert Sorcery Points to a spell slot
Innate Sorcery: Can use a bonus action to gain +1 spell DC and advantage on spell attacks for 1 min 2 times per long rest
Lay On Hands: Can use bonus actions to heal 10 hit points per long rest and can use 5 hit points' worth to remove a poisoned condition
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magical Cunning: Can use a 1 min process to regain 1 Pact Magic spell slot once per long rest
Pact Magic: Can cast spells from the Warlock spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Pact Of The Blade: Can use a bonus action to create a bonded simple or martial pact weapon or to bond with a touched magic weapon and gain proficiency with it; it can be used as a spellcasting focus, and its Charisma-based attacks inflict a choice of necrotic, psychic, radiant, or normal weapon damage; moving 5' away from the weapon for 1 min ends the bond
Paladin's Smite: Can cast Divine Smite once per long rest
Repelling Blast: Can inflict a 10' push on a Large or smaller target with a successful attack using a chosen Warlock cantrip
Ritual Adept: Can cast spells marked with [R] as rituals without preparation
Seeking Spell: Can spend 1 Sorcery Point to reroll a failed spell attack
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the wizard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Subtle Spell: Can spend 1 Sorcery Point to cast a spell without somatic, material, or verbal components
Wild Companion: Can expend a spell slot or a use of Wild Shape to summon a Fey familiar using Find Familiar; the familiar remains present until the next long rest
Wild Shape: Can use a bonus action to transform into a CR 1/4 (non-flying) creature with 2 temporary hit points for 1 hr 2 times per long rest; a short rest restores 1 use
Notes
Validation Errors:
Skill And Tool Proficiency Allocation: 23 available vs. 22 allocated
Skill Proficiency Allocation: 19 available vs. 18 allocated
